heading: Organization
label: 120101 Organization
notes: References in TextSection 501(c)(19) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986, referred to in subsec. (a), is classified to , Internal Revenue Code.section 501(c)(19) of Title 26

children.heading: .—Federal Charter
children.label: a .—Federal Charter
children.text: Korean War Veterans Association, Incorporated (in this chapter, the “corporation”), a nonprofit organization that meets the requirements for a veterans service organization under section 501(c)(19) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 and that is organized under the laws of the State of New York, is a federally chartered corporation.

children.heading: .—Expiration of Charter
children.label: b .—Expiration of Charter
children.text: If the corporation does not comply with the provisions of this chapter, the charter granted by subsection (a) shall expire.
